text:
Once upon a time in a quaint little town lived a curious fox. Every day after dusk, the fox would stroll down the empty streets, listening to the whispering leaves. It loved tales of adventure. One night, he stumbled upon a shadowy alley. There stood an old, wise owl. "What brings you out so late?" the fox asked.

"I'm listening to tales," the owl replied. "But there's one I've heard that makes me frightened!"

"Sounds impressive. Share it!" begged the fox.

"The old lady who lives there tells tales so eerily true that sometimes I think I hear her laughter."

"Oooh. I love scary stories!" exclaimed the fox.

"Hooohoasaurus Rex!" quivered the owl.

A laugh. Just a laugh.

That same night, stars didn’t shine so bright. The old lady lay awake staring at an owl feather.

One moonlight hour later, an owl flew past.

She raced inside and locked herself away
